name: My back started hurting after lifting boxes at work in Boise Idaho, is this a work injury I can claim?
description: Yes if during job duties—report immediately within 60 days in Idaho or forfeit benefits[6].

mainEntity.name: My back started hurting after lifting boxes at work in Boise Idaho, is this a work injury I can claim?

acceptedAnswer.text: Yes if during job duties—report immediately within 60 days in Idaho or forfeit benefits[6].
acceptedAnswer.description: **Yes, if it arose out of and in the course of employment, like during job duties.** Idaho covers injuries from work activities, but report within 60 days or lose benefits[6]. Provide details on when/where/how to your employer. **Key factors:** Immediate reporting required; even minor injuries must be reported; medical causation needed for conditions like repetitive strain. **Practical guidance:** Tell your boss today, fill out First Report of Injury form together, and see a doctor. Don't delay as insurers question late claims. **Early reporting protects your rights.**
